channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This device is causing electricity surges in my house. I wake up in the morning and my hair is stood up and I can feel the electricity pulsing through the house. I have spoken to gigaclear and National grid and they told me to contact you. Please can this be moved as people are selling their houses because of this., 22nd May
item.description:
Device on column 5 - please call me.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Cheltenham Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose slab and large gaps around catv box, 22nd May
item.description:
Outside number 46 opp 47

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Duke Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken tree, 22nd May
item.description:
Broken tree protruding into carriage way causing damage to vehicles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Original Enquiry Number: 22089412, 22nd May
item.description:
I have today been contacted again by the original complainant regarding this loose drain cover on Mill Lane, as they have advised that the issue still has not been resolved. This was originally reported on 29th October 2025. I note from your email in November that the enquiry had been attended to, a repair job had been raised, and that the works were due to be programmed and completed by the end of November. You also mentioned that an administrative error had affected the update on the system. Given that several months have now passed, could you please clarify: Why the repair has still not been completed; Whether the job was in fact programmed and, if so, what happened; What the current status of the repair is; and When the issue will now be resolved. I would appreciate an urgent update so I can respond appropriately to the resident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Mill Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
